name: @brand-gen/openclaw-plugin
description: OpenClaw MCP bridge plugin for brand-gen — autonomous brand material generation with persistent memory

scripts.typecheck: node --check src/index.ts && node --check src/mcp-bridge.ts && node --check src/memory.ts && if command -v tsc >/dev/null 2>&1; then tsc --noEmit; else echo 'warning: tsc not installed; syntax-only fallback used'; fi
